title: Zosterophyllanthos bivalvis
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos bivalvis is classified as a species of plant in the family Anacampserotaceae. It belongs to the order Caryophyllales and the clade Angiosperms, which includes flowering plants. The kingdom it falls under is Plantae, encompassing all plants. Zosterophyllanthos bivalvis also belongs to the division Magnoliophyta and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
